mapper.select: /* selectOms02SkuwcSelectBox */ select MS.COMPKEY as COMPKEY , MS.WAREKEY as WAREKEY , MS.OWNERKY as OWNERKY , MS.SKUMKEY as SKUMKEY , MS.SKUDESC as SKUDESC , MS.SKUSKEY as SKUSKEY , MS.SUOMKEY as SUOMKEY , case when MS.SKUSTAT = 'OUT' then 'Y' else 'N' end as SKUSTAT , MS.PACKKEY as PACKKEY , MP.TRUNTYP as TRUNTYP , IFNULL(MP.PACKQTY, 0) as PACKQTY , IFNULL(ST.STOTQTY , 0) as STOTQTY from MSKUWC MS left join ( select COMPKEY, OWNERKY, WAREKEY , SKUMKEY, SKUDESC , LOTAT17, LOTAT18, LOTAT19, LOTAT20 , (sum(STOTQTY)- sum(SBLOQTY)) as STOTQTY from WSTKKY where COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and WAREKEY = #{warekey} and AREAKEY = 'STG' and SALLQTY = 0 and SINBQTY = 0 and SOUBQTY = 0 group by COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, SKUMKEY , LOTAT17, LOTAT18, LOTAT19, LOTAT20 ) ST on ST.COMPKEY = MS.COMPKEY and ST.WAREKEY = MS.WAREKEY and ST.OWNERKY = MS.OWNERKY and ST.SKUMKEY = MS.SKUMKEY left join MPAKMA MP on MP.COMPKEY = MS.COMPKEY and MP.WAREKEY = MS.WAREKEY and MP.PACKKEY = MS.PACKKEY and MP.TRUNTYP = MS.TRUNTYP and MP.PKUSEYN = 'Y' where MS.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and MS.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and MS.OWNERKY = #{ownerky} and MS.SKUSTAT = 'PRODUCT' group by MS.SKUMKEY , MS.SKUDESC order by MS.SKUDESC
/* selectCustomer */ select PT.COMPKEY , PT.PTNRKEY , PT.PTNAMLC from MPTNMA PT where PT.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and PT.PTNRTYP ='CUSTOMER' and PT.PTUSEYN = 'Y'

/* selectDestkey */ select PT.COMPKEY , PT.PTNRKEY , DE.DESTKEY , DE.DENAMLC from MDESMA DE left join MPTNMA PT on DE.PTNRKEY = PT.PTNRKEY and DE.COMPKEY = PT.COMPKEY where PT.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and PT.PTNRTYP = 'CUSTOMER' and PT.PTUSEYN = 'Y' and DEUSEYN = 'Y'
and DE.PTNRKEY = #{ptnrkey}
mapper.insert: /* insertOcosal */ insert into OCOSAL( COMPKEY, COOUTKY, COOUTIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, POSTDAT, SALDATE, SALTIME, TOWARKY, CUSTKEY, SALMEMO, SALRQDT, SALRQTM, DESTKEY, OWNERKY, SKUSKEY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, SOITQTY, RGITQTY, SHCFQTY, SUOMKEY, DCTCTYP, SALSTAT, SAATN01, SAATN02, SAATN03, SAATN04, SAATN05, SAATC01, SAATC02, SAATC03, SAATC04, SAATC05, SAATC06, SAATC07, SAATC08, SAATC09, SAATC10, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) values ( #{userData.compkey}, #{cooutky}, FN_OM_COOUTIT(#{userData.compkey}, #{cooutky}), #{doccate}, #{doctype}, DATE_FORMAT(#{postdat},'%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{warekey}, #{custkey}, upper(ifnull(#{salmemo},'')), DATE_FORMAT(#{salrqdt},'%Y%m%d'), replace(#{salrqtm},':',''), #{destkey}, #{ownerky}, ifnull(#{skuskey},''), #{skumkey}, (select SKUDESC from MSKUWC where COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and OWNERKY = #{ownerky} and WAREKEY =#{warekey} and SKUMKEY= #{skumkey}), #{soitqty}, #{rgitqty}, #{shcfqty}, #{suomkey}, #{dctctyp}, #{salstat}, #{saatn01}, #{saatn02}, #{saatn03}, #{saatn04}, #{saatn05}, upper(ifnull(#{saatc01},'')), upper(ifnull(#{saatc02},'')), upper(ifnull(#{saatc03},'')), upper(ifnull(#{saatc04},'')), upper(ifnull(#{saatc05},'')), ifnull(trim(#{saatc06}),'NO DATA') , upper(ifnull(#{saatc07},'')), upper(ifnull(#{saatc08},'')), upper(ifnull(#{saatc09},'')), upper(ifnull(#{saatc10},'')), date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} , date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )

/* insertWshpitOrder */ insert into WSHPIT ( COMPKEY , SHPDCKY , SHPDCIT , WAREKEY , DOCCATE , DOCTYPE , PICKTYP , OWNERKY , SKUMKEY , SKUDESC , SALDATE , CUSTKEY , SALMEMO , SALRQDT , SALRQTM , SHCUQTY , RGITQTY , SUOMKEY , COOUTKY , COOUTIT , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER ) values ( #{userData.compkey} , #{shpdcky} , FN_WM_SHPDCIT(#{userData.compkey}, #{shpdcky}) , #{warekey} , #{doccate} , #{doctype} , #{picktyp} , #{ownerky} , #{skumkey} , #{skudesc} , DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), #{custkey} , #{salmemo} , DATE_FORMAT(#{salrqdt},'%Y%m%d'), replace(#{salrqtm},':','') , #{soitqty} , #{rgitqty} , #{suomkey} , #{cooutky} , (select MAX(COOUTIT) from OCOSAL where COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and COOUTKY = #{cooutky}) , date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} , date_format(NOW(),'%Y%m%d'), date_format(NOW(),'%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )
mapper.select: select fn_om_cooutky() as cooutky from dual
select fn_wm_posdate(#{userData.compkey}, #{warekey}) as postdat from dual
CALL sp_om_ocosal( #{userData.compkey}, #{cooutky}, #{doccate}, #{userData.useract} , #{omsgkey, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oresult, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER})
select RSNCODE, RSNCDNM from MRSCMA where compkey = #{userData.compkey} and DOCCATE = #{doccate} and DOCTYPE = '230' and RSCATE1 = 'NORMAL'
CALL sp_om_ocosal_cancel( #{userData.compkey}, #{cooutky}, #{cooutit}, #{rsncode}, #{rsndesc} ,#{userData.useract} , #{omsgkey, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oresult, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER} )
